guides_discovered_not_indexed.likely_cause: Guides have decent content but Google hasn't crawled them. Phase 16.12G fixes (title + schema) should help.
guides_discovered_not_indexed.fix_deployed: Phase 16.12G — meta title cleanup + Article schema for all 125 guides
guides_discovered_not_indexed.measurement_due: Check GSC in 14 days for guide indexation changes

tools_no_demand.classification: Tier 2/3 programmatic tools with no search demand
tools_no_demand.action: Consolidation review — do NOT mass-delete. Review individually.

blogs_ctr_zero.likely_cause: Blogs have impressions but no clicks — weak title/meta or answer cannibalization
blogs_ctr_zero.action: CTR fix via Phase 17 daily execution

templates_working_well: Decision pages — strong content, good FAQ, indexed
Guide template — good structure (FAQ, examples, links) but needs crawl

pages_to_never_create_again: Geo-swapped city pages without unique value
